name: Corn Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon in a large pot until crispy. Drain the excess fat.
2. Add the diced onion to the bacon fat and sauté over medium heat until translucent.
3. Stir in the corn, potatoes, cream of mushroom soup, and milk.
4. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for about 20-25 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
